name: Marketing attribution — models and best practices
snippet: Marketing attribution is the process of determining which interactions influence a customer to purchase from your brand.

name: What is attribution modeling? - AppsFlyer
snippet: Attribution modeling is a way of measuring how effective marketing campaigns and channels are at influencing people to take a desired action.

name: What is attribution modeling? - Adjust
snippet: Attribution modeling, also known as channel attribution modeling, is the process of assigning credit to various marketing channels or touchpoints.

name: Attribution (marketing) - Wikipedia

name: What is Marketing Attribution? A Comprehensive Guide - Amazon Ads
snippet: Marketing attribution models enable advertisers to measure and optimize the unique touchpoints that lead to conversions and sales.

name: What Is Attribution Modeling? Types and Benefits - Aerospike

name: A Beginner's Guide to Attribution Model Frameworks - Amplitude

name: Marketing Attribution: All You Need to Know - Salesforce
snippet: Marketing attribution is the way in which marketers assess the value or ROI of the channels that connect them to potential customers.

name: Marketing attribution models: A complete guide for modern marketers
